priceOnlyControl_Mayer.note: price-only control MATCHES/BEATS best on-chain (0.898) -> on-chain adds nothing

diagnosis: Every long-flat on-chain family is ~always-long (longShare~1.0, turnover~0.002): a buy&hold clone. Best on-chain net Sharpe (0.898) does NOT out-Sharpe its own buy&hold (0.853 vs random-lottery95 ~0.93) and is matched/beaten by the price-only Mayer control (0.911). When beta is removed by causal orthogonalization vs price MA, the residual has zero/negative timing content (S2 net Sharpe -0.026) and FAILS the consume-once holdout (S1 -0.421, S2 -0.462). Surrogate 'passes' in F2/F3 only because phase-scrambling slightly degrades the always-long bias on a rising asset — the binding kill is that it loses to plain buy&hold after honest-N deflation (DSR p<=0.74, Harvey-Liu adjP 0.10-0.14).
confidenceReason: 11.4y BTC, exact free realized-cap derivation, full committed gauntlet, RIGHT phase-rand surrogate, dedicated price-only control AND beta-neutral residual all agree: long-beta in disguise with no residual content; holdout negative once beta removed.
